why: Declared `public final class` with only a private (code,msg,data) constructor and no no-arg ctor/@JsonCreator; under DefaultTyping.NON_FINAL Jackson omits type info for final classes and cannot instantiate it on cache read-back -> 'cannot construct instance / missing type information'.

activateDefaultTyping(validator, DefaultTyping.NON_FINAL, As.PROPERTY) plus binding OBJECT_REDIS_SERIALIZER to Object.class is what requires embedded @class type info; final Result and its generic `data` field are not tagged, so the round-trip fails and time fields deserialize to untyped values.
